name: S-14 (SS-119)
events: 12 Aug 1943 USS S-14 departed Coco Solo, Panama Canal Zone for New London, Connecticut.
24 Aug 1943 USS S-14 arrived at New London, Connecticut from Coco Solo, Panama Canal Zone.
8 Oct 1944 USS S-14 departed New London, Connecticut for Casco Bay, Maine.
9 Oct 1944 USS S-14 arrived at Casco Bay, Maine from New London, Connecticut.
4 Nov 1944 USS S-14 departed Casco Bay, Maine for New London, Connecticut.
5 Nov 1944 USS S-14 arrived at New London, Connecticut from Casco Bay, Maine.
19 Nov 1944 USS S-14 departed New London, Connecticut for Casco Bay, Maine.
20 Nov 1944 USS S-14 arrived at Casco Bay, Maine from New London, Connecticut.
23 Dec 1944 USS S-14 departed Casco Bay, Maine for New London, Connecticut.
24 Dec 1944 USS S-14 arrived at New London, Connecticut from Casco Bay, Maine.
3 Feb 1945 USS S-14 departed New London, Connecticut for Casco Bay, Maine.
4 Feb 1945 USS S-14 arrived at Casco Bay, Maine from New London, Connecticut.
11 Mar 1945 USS S-14 departed Casco Bay, Maine for New London, Connecticut.
12 Mar 1945 USS S-14 arrived at New London, Connecticut from Casco Bay, Maine.
27 Apr 1945 USS S-14 departed New London, Connecticut for the Philadelphia Navy Yard.
28 Apr 1945 USS S-14 arrived at the Philadelphia Navy Yard.
